Case# CTWritingDirection.leftToRight

iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS


## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/ctwritingdirection/lefttoright#Discussion)

The writing direction is left to right.
